message:
fix(shellcheck): export ACFS_COMMIT_DATE to silence warning

The variable was being stored for debugging purposes but never used
within the script itself. Exporting it makes it available to child
processes and silences the SC2034 shellcheck warning.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -270,7 +270,7 @@ ACFS_MUTED="#6c7086"
 # Fetch commit SHA and date from GitHub API
 # This ensures we always know exactly which version is running
 # ============================================================
-ACFS_COMMIT_DATE=""
+export ACFS_COMMIT_DATE=""  # exported for child processes/debugging
 ACFS_COMMIT_AGE=""
 
 fetch_commit_sha() {
